/usr/bin/c++  -std=c++14 -march=native -O3 -ggdb -Wall -Wextra -Wno-missing-braces -Wall -Wextra -Wno-missing-braces -Wconversion -O3 -DNDEBUG -rdynamic CMakeFiles/perftest_cartesian_tree.dir/perftest_cartesian_tree.cpp.o -o ../../../perftest_cartesian_tree  ../libsuccinct.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_unit_test_framework.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_iostreams.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_filesystem.so.1.74.0
